Brand Voice & Positioning
Positioning Anchor
→
"Grab & go protein for people who care — not bodybuilders."
Calm confidence + functional energy. High-performance food, but effortless. FUUL sits exactly at the intersection of habit and intention — where Pret meets performance nutrition.
Tone Matrix
We are
Disciplined without being preachy. Purposeful without being boring. We make function feel desirable.
We are not
A gym brand. A diet brand. A wellness-cult. We don't moralize. We just perform.
Copy style
Short. Declarative. No waffle. "Feed the Effort." not "Nourish Your Journey™"
Target state
Customer says: "I trust this." — not "I admire this."
Iconography — Minimal, Functional
Energy
Protein
Fast

Smoothies & Shakes
The Attach
Effect.
40% shake attach rate adds £3.20 to every transaction. 20% snack attach adds £0.50. Together they build the £13.00 blended AOV that makes the model work.

Revenue Model
Transaction Ramp
40 tx/day at open → 225 mature state (Month 9). Break-even at 140 tx/day (Month 7).
Ramp Period
EBITDA Positive
Key Milestones
Month 1
Site opens. Angel / Upper Street, Islington.
Months 2–3
Ramp period. Building the regular customer base.
Month 6
Pre-opening costs fully amortised.
Month 7
First EBITDA-positive month.
Month 9
Mature transaction volumes reached. Playbook documented.
Months 10–12
Every month cash-generative. Site 2 scouting underway.
Year 1
Operational playbook proven. Angel site profitable.
Year 2
Site 2 opens. Group EBITDA margin expands.
Year 3
Third site open. Replication model proven. FUUL is a group.
